attributes.headline: DAM FAILURE WARNING: Oroville Dam catastrophic failure imminent. EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY all areas along Feather River from Oroville Dam to Gridley. Move to high ground NOW.
FLASH FLOOD EMERGENCY: Catastrophic flooding expected along Feather River corridor from Oroville to Sacramento Valley. Life-threatening floodwaters. EVACUATE NOW.
FLASH FLOOD EMERGENCY for Thermalito and Palermo. Wall of water approaching. Move to high ground IMMEDIATELY. Do not attempt to drive through floodwaters.
FLASH FLOOD EMERGENCY for Gridley and Biggs. Major flooding expected within 2-4 hours from dam failure upstream. EVACUATE to higher ground east of Hwy 99.
DAM FAILURE WARNING: Thermalito Afterbay Dam overtopping due to Oroville Dam failure. All residents south of Thermalito Afterbay evacuate immediately via Hwy 70 south.
